caption: A young man with glasses and a black t-shirt featuring a graphic design stands in front of a whiteboard, gesturing as he speaks. He appears to be giving a presentation or lecture, using hand movements to emphasize his points. His body language suggests he is engaged and passionate about the topic. The setting looks like a classroom or conference room, with a simple, professional environment. As he continues, he shifts his stance slightly, maintaining eye contact with his audience while explaining his ideas.
